name: Intervals Run
description: Made the Hard fairly hard and the easy fairly easy 👍🏻\n\nI think I could go easier on the easy (even if a run/walk) and make the hard harder - improvement for next time

name: Morning Run
description:
Solid Run with Clayton and Lauren, foot started barely going numb around 4ish miles - but was not really all that numb until after 6 miles. 

Did some mild dynamic and static stretching prior to the run. Also had good step count all this week which I also think probably helped out.

Felt pretty decent on the run today - definitely tired near the end, especially hip flexors and Heart, but all in all I was impressed by my run.

name: Intervals Run
description: Felt much better today - intervals were hard but doable.\n\nFoot went numb later than normal too which is nice

name: Morning Run with Ren
description:
A nice job on the local running track with my beautiful wife 🙌🏻 A great morning!

Thanks to “The Lost Art of Running” by Shane Benzie my running form was SO MUCH BETTER and I was able to run so much more efficiently!

For the first time in a long time my body didn’t ache from a run. Easing my way back into running with a short & slow pace 👌🏻

Grand Tour Race Prep
description: If you are at all into cycling check out the first ever “indieVelo Grand Tour” racing series in the end of August! I’m super excited!\n\nRace details are here (and also on discord):   https://docs.google.com/document/u/0/d/1v8XwByXs35M0eaOIXdkrh98HLtZkLOzyo_uOs1fmXzI/mobilebasic

name: indieVelo - Race: 🥇 (DIRTy Sprockets Smash)
description:
Was able to control the race from beginning to end - really solid race in Pen 3. Looking forward to going up to Pen 2 soon!

I decided to try my luck again in a longer distance “breakaway” from over 3km out to the finish line. I took my gap from 6 seconds up to 30 second by the finish line - got MANY power PBs in the process.

Very happy with that race 🙌

name: Back Bay Loops 15k
description:
Really fun event that Clayton Mohler and Amanda Mohler put on for a bunch of friends! 

Lauren Sopp absolutely killed it! She was nice and slowed down for me to keep up with her! 💪🏻🥰

Keaton Kerr & Zach Arnold were great running partners as well, great job! 👏🏻 

It was a fun run with some sweet treats at the end too! A cool tee-shirt and some “medals”
